Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
54 
CCW_LD_DT 
LABEL: 
CCW Load Date 
DESCRIPTION: The Date Source File was loaded to the CCW. 
SHORT NAME: CCW_LD_DT 
LONG NAME: CCW_LD_DT 
TYPE: 
DATE 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
CCW (derived) 
FILE(S): 
IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 
VALUES: 
Date (numeric, system dependent) 
COMMENT: 
States may resubmit T-MSIS claims data to CMS. This date indicates when the claims were
